greeting: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! What's on your mind?
how_are_you: I'm just a program, but I'm doing great! How about you?
name: I'm ChatBot, your friendly assistant.
You can call me ChatBot.
joke: Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs!
Why did the developer go broke? Because he used up all his cache.
I told my computer I needed a break, and it said 'No problem, I'll go to sleep.'
Why was the function sad after a party? It didn't get called.
There are 10 kinds of people: those who understand binary and those who don't.

fallback: Sorry, I didn't quite understand that.
Hmm, I'm not sure how to respond to that yet.
Could you rephrase that for me?
